# Kindle Auto Classifier

Automatically classify your Kindle books into collections using AI.

## Quick Links

- [Installation Guide](README.md#installation)
- [Usage Instructions](README.md#usage)
- [Troubleshooting](README.md#troubleshooting)

## Features

- AI-powered book classification
- Multi-page library scanning
- Batch processing
- Auto-apply to collections

## Installation

1. Install [Tampermonkey](https://www.tampermonkey.net/)
2. [Install Script](https://github.com/neufvingt/kindle-auto-classifier/raw/main/kindle-classifier.user.js)
3. Configure your API key
4. Start classifying!

## Support

For issues and questions, please [open an issue](https://github.com/neufvingt/kindle-auto-classifier/issues).
